7 // -*- C++ -*-
8 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_TIME_TIMELINE_SPIEDTIMEVARIABLES_H
9 #define ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_TIME_TIMELINE_SPIEDTIMEVARIABLES_H
10 /* Author : desrozis at Sun Oct 26 22:30:37 2014
11  * Generated by createNew
12  */
13 
14 #include "ArcGeoSim/Time/TimeVariables.h"
15 
16 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/Spy.h"
17 
18 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
19 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
20 
21 BEGIN_ARCGEOSIM_NAMESPACE
22 
23 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
24 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
25 
26 class SpiedTimeVariables
27  : public TimeVariables
28 {
29 public:
30 
31  SpiedTimeVariables(Arcane::ISubDomain* sd)
32  : TimeVariables(sd)
33  , m_spied_time(m_time)
34  , m_spied_initial_time(m_initial_time)
35  , m_spied_final_time(m_final_time)
36  , m_spied_init_dt(m_init_dt)
37  , m_spied_dt(m_dt)
38  , m_spied_forced_dt(m_forced_dt) {}
39 
40  virtual ~SpiedTimeVariables() {}
41 
42  void lock()
43  {
44  m_spied_time.lock();
45  m_spied_initial_time.lock();
46  m_spied_final_time.lock();
47  m_spied_init_dt.lock();
48  m_spied_dt.lock();
49  m_spied_forced_dt.lock();
50  }
51 
52  void unlock(SpyPolicy::ePolicy policy = SpyPolicy::FatalIfChanged)
53  {
54  m_spied_time.unlock(policy);
55  m_spied_initial_time.unlock(policy);
56  m_spied_final_time.unlock(policy);
57  m_spied_init_dt.unlock(policy);
58  m_spied_dt.unlock(policy);
59  m_spied_forced_dt.unlock(SpyPolicy::NothingIfChanged);
60  }
61 
62 protected:
63 
65  Spy<Arcane::VariableScalarReal> m_spied_time;
66 
68  Spy<Arcane::VariableScalarReal> m_spied_initial_time;
69 
71  Spy<Arcane::VariableScalarReal> m_spied_final_time;
72 
74  Spy<Arcane::VariableScalarReal> m_spied_init_dt;
75 
77  Spy<Arcane::VariableScalarReal> m_spied_dt;
78 
80  // policy is never fatal
81  Spy<Arcane::VariableScalarReal> m_spied_forced_dt;
82 };
83 
84 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
85 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
86 
87 END_ARCGEOSIM_NAMESPACE
88
